zh.lifeSummary: 當Bertha Ferrers於大約1204年出生在英國德比夏爾時，她的父親William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby43歲，母親Agnes of Chester31歲。她於1238年與Ralph Bigod結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1267年2月10日在英國諾廷加姆爾沃可索普享年64歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可登維其格也福利亞斯 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bertha Ferrers于大约1204年出生在英国德比夏爾时，她的父亲William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby43岁，母亲Agnes of Chester31岁。她于1238年与Ralph Bigod结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1267年2月10日在英国諾廷加姆爾沃可索普享年64岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可登維其格也福利亞斯 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Bertha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of a Continental Germanic name, a short form of various compound women's personal names derived from berht ‘famous’ (akin to Modern English bright). It probably existed in England before the Conquest, and was certainly reinforced by Norman use, but fell out of use in the 15th century. It was reintroduced into the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century, but has once again gone out of fashion.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Bertha Ferrers was born about 1204, in Derbyshire, England, her father, William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby, was 43 and her mother, Agnes of Chester, was 31. She married Ralph Bigod in 1238. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 10 February 1267, in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Greyfriars Priory, Dunwich, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bertha Ferrers est née environ 1204, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Agnes of Chester, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Bigod en 1238. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 10 février 1267, à Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Greyfriars Priory, Dunwich, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bertha Ferrers um 1204 in Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby 43 und ihre Mutter Agnes of Chester 31. Sie hat 1238 Ralph Bigod geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 10. Februar 1267 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England und wurde in Greyfriars Priory, Dunwich, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bertha Ferrers è nata il circa 1204 nel Derbyshire, England, sua padre, William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Agnes of Chester, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Ralph Bigod nel 1238. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 febbraio 1267, nel Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Greyfriars Priory, Dunwich, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Bertha Ferrersが約1204年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derbyは43歳，母Agnes of Chesterは31歳であった。1238年にRalph Bigodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1267年2月10日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウオルクソップで64歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクダンウィチグレイフリアルズ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Cottingham, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 컷잉함
ko.lifeSummary: Bertha Ferrers(이)가 대략 1204년 영국 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes of Chester(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1238년 Ralph Bigod(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1267년 2월 10일 영국 노틴그함실르 워크소프에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 던위치 그리프리아르스 플리오리에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Ralph Bigod em 1238. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.Cottingham, Yorkshire, England: коттингхам, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bertha Ferrers родилась около 1204 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes of Chester, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Bigod в 1238 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 10 февраля 1267 г. в местности ворксоп, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности грифрярс приори, дунвич, суффолк, Англия.
